title: Create: Colorful Pipes
description: Adds colored variants of pipes, tanks, and fluid components for Create.
body:
# Create: Colorful Pipes

Create: Colorful Pipes adds 16 colored variants of Create fluid components while keeping full functionality and Create-style visuals.

## Features

Adds 16 colored variants of

- Fluid Pipes
- Glass Fluid Pipes
- Smart Fluid Pipes
- Encased Fluid Pipes
- Fluid Valves
- Fluid Pumps 
- Fluid Tanks
- Boiler Gauges
- Item Drains
- Spouts
- Steam Whistles
- Copper Casing Blocks
- Hose Pulleys

![Pipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d96ae6c20e76dd1119de1a2ec636d9d686eb2808.png)

<details>
<summary>Compatibility</summary>

<details>
<summary>Dye Depot Support</summary>

## Colorful Depot
Adds Dye Depot palette support with 16 additional color variants for pipes, tanks, and fluid components. [Download Colorful Depot](https://modrinth.com/mod/colorful-depot) & [Download Dye Depot](https://modrinth.com/mod/dye-depot)

![colored tanks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/s1I9GeSl/images/10103acbdbb727ccf9d763aa737cacf5e90e0062.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Create More: Parallel Pipes Support</summary>

## Create More: Parallel Pipes
Allows Colored pipes to behave like encased pipes, preventing automatic connections between different colored pipes.
[Download Create More: Parallel Pipes](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-more-parallel-pipes)

![Pipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8adaa89d84103610d8aa3abcc129154d6a5e54c6.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Create: Connected Support</summary>
  
  ## Create: Connected
[Download Create: Connected](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-connected)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Create: Dragons Plus Support</summary>
  
  ## Create: Dragons Plus
[Download Create: Dragons Plus](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-dragons-plus)
  
</details>

<details>
<summary>Create: Enchantment Industry Support</summary>
  
  ## Create: Enchantment Industry
[Download Create: Enchantment Industry](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-enchantment-industry)
</details>

</details>
